name_en: M62170 Grey Blue! Chip Version. This cardholder style is stylish and chic, made of new Monogram Eclipse coated canvas. Compact and fits easily in a pocket. Features a central pocket and four slots for credit cards, plane and boat tickets, and business cards. Dimensions: 11.0 x 7.0 x 1.5 cm (L x H x W)
